creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tijl Coosemans from comment #1)
> It's still needed by security/openvpn-polarssl

Ah, no, that's security/polarssl (1.2.x).  security/polarssl13 is still needed by all other ports that use polarssl though, and is still supported by upstream (until December 2016).
